name: Discretionary Reduction of Frivolous Penalties

eligibility.description: Taxpayers subject to Section 6702 penalties who can demonstrate that a reduction in the penalty amount would improve their future tax compliance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The Secretary may reduce the amount of a frivolous submission penalty if it is determined that such a reduction would promote compliance with and administration of Federal tax laws.
